sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: AMD는 3분기 매출 92억 달러를 기록하며 전년 대비 36% 성장하는 등 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출은 92억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 36% 증가하며 분기 기준 사상 최대치를 기록했습니다.
데이터 센터 AI 사업의 가파른 성장과 컴퓨팅 프랜차이즈 확장이 매출 및 이익 성장을 견인했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 데이터 센터 부문 매출은 43억 달러로 전년 대비 22% 증가했으며, 이는 5세대 EPYC 프로세서와 Instinct MI350 시리즈 GPU에 대한 강력한 수요 덕분입니다.
클라이언트 및 게이밍 부문 매출은 40억 달러로 전년 대비 73% 증가했으며, 특히 클라이언트 부문은 28억 달러의 사상 최대 매출을 달성했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 GAAP 기준 영업이익은 13억 달러, 순이익은 12억 달러, 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.75달러를 기록했습니다.
Non-GAAP 기준 영업이익은 22억 달러, 순이익은 20억 달러, 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 1.20달러로 집계되었습니다.

watchItems.text: 데이터 센터 AI 가속기 사업의 지속적인 확장세와 4분기 가이던스 달성 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q32025991.htm EX-99.1 Document NEWS RELEASE Media Contact: Phil Hughes AMD Communications 512-865-9697 phil.hughes@amd.com Investor Contact: Liz Stine AMD Investor Relations 720-652-3965 liz.stine@amd.com AMD Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results SANTA CLARA, Calif. ― November 4, 2025 ― AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) today announced financial results for the third quarter of 2025. Third quarter revenue was a record $9.2 billion, gross margin was 52%, operating income was $1.3 billion, net income was $1.2 billion and diluted earnings per share was $ 0.75 . On a non-GAAP (*) basis, gross margin was 54%, operating income was $2.2 billion, net income was $2 billion and diluted earnings per share was $1.20. Our third quarter results did not include any  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.2 billion = 92억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $2.2 billion = 22억 달러; $2 billion = 20억 달러; $9.2 = 9.2달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $2.2 = 2.2달러; $0.75 = 0.75달러; $2 = 2달러; $1.20 = 1.20달러.

ility reflecting broad based demand for our high-performance EPYC and Ryzen processors and Instinct AI accelerators," said Dr. Lisa Su, AMD chair and CEO. "Our record third quarter performance and strong fourth quarter guidance marks a clear step up in our growth trajectory as our expanding compute franchise and rapidly scaling data center AI business drive significant revenue and earnings growth." “We delivered record quarterly revenue of $9.2 billion, up 36% year-over-year, and generated record free cash flow, reflecting the strength of our leadership portfolio and disciplined execution,” said Jean Hu, AMD executive vice president, chief financial officer and treasurer. “Our continued investments in AI and high-performance computing are driving significant growth and position AMD to deliver long-term value creation.” 1 GAAP Quarterly Financial Results Q3 2025 (1) Q3 2024 Y/Y Q2 2025 (2  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.2 billion = 92억 달러; $9.2 = 9.2달러.

) Q/Q Revenue ($M) $9,246 $6,819 Up 36% $7,685 Up 20% Gross profit ($M) $4,780 $3,419 Up 40% $3,059 Up 56% Gross margin 52% 50% Up 2 ppts 40% Up 12 ppts Operating expenses ($M) $3,510 $2,695 Up 30% $3,193 Up 10% Operating income (loss) ($M) $1,270 $724 Up 75% $(134) Up 1,048% Operating margin 14% 11% Up 3 ppts (2)% Up 16 ppts Net income ($M) $1,243 $771 Up 61% $872 Up 43% Diluted earnings per share $0.75 $0.47 Up 60% $0.54 Up 39% Non-GAAP(*) Quarterly Financial Results Q3 2025 (1) Q3 2024 Y/Y Q2 2025 (2) Q/Q Revenue ($M) $9,246 $6,819 Up 36% $7,685 Up 20% Gross pro  Normalized numeric aliases: $9,246 = 9,246달러; $6,819 = 6,819달러; $7,685 = 7,685달러; $4,780 = 4,780달러; $3,419 = 3,419달러; $3,059 = 3,059달러; $3,510 = 3,510달러; $2,695 = 2,695달러; $1,270 = 1,270달러; $0.75 = 0.75달러; $3,326 = 3,326달러; $1,715 = 1,715달러; 9,246 million = 92억 4,600만 달러; 3,059 million = 30억 5,900만 달러; 1,048 million = 10억 4,800만 달러; 2,754 million = 27억 5,400만 달러; 1,965 million = 19억 6,500만 달러; 1,942 million = 19억 4,200만 달러.

1.20 $0.92 Up 30% $0.48 Up 150% (1) Third quarter of 2025 results do not include any revenue from shipments of the AMD Instinct™ MI308 GPU products to China. (2) Second quarter of 2025 results included $800 million in inventory and related charges as a result of the U.S. Government's export control on AMD Instinct™ MI308 data center GPU products. Excluding these charges, non-GAAP gross margin for the second quarter of 2025 would have been approximately 54%. Segment Summary • Data Center segment revenue was $4.3 billion, up 22% year-over-year primarily driven by strong demand for 5 th Gen AMD EPYC™ processors and AMD Instinct MI350 Series GPUs. • Client and Gaming segment revenue was $4 billion, up 73% year-over-year. Client revenue was a record $2.8 billion, up 46% year-ove  Normalized numeric aliases: $800 million = 8억 달러; $4.3 billion = 43억 달러; $4 billion = 40억 달러; $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $0.92 = 0.92달러; $0.48 = 0.48달러; $800 = 800달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러; $4 = 4달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
